timeline.speaker: CEO
timeline.text: Thank you all for joining on such short notice. We are facing a serious cyber incident affecting hospital operations.

timeline.speaker: System
timeline.text: What values are at stake in this incident, and who are the key stakeholders?

timeline.speaker: System
timeline.text: What are the major uncertainties at this stage, and how would you reduce them?

timeline.speaker: System
timeline.text: Given the situation, what actions should leadership take in the next two hours?
